pi_items.source: setup_task.sh script explicitly inserts 'Marcus' into the ptfname column of the patient table.
setup_task.sh script explicitly inserts 'Vance' into the ptlname column of the patient table.
setup_task.sh script explicitly inserts '09:00:00' into the caltimeof column of the scheduler table.

The task description instructs the agent to update the status to 'No-Show' (or equivalent 'No Show'/'Missed'), and the verifier.py VLM prompt strictly checks for visual evidence of 'No Show', 'No-Show', or 'Missed' being selected.

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for freemed_env record_appointment_noshow task by confirming that the patient Marcus Vance and his 09:00 AM appointment are synthetically generated and explicitly injected into the FreeMED database via setup_task.sh SQL queries. Verified that the expected target status 'No Show' exactly matches both the task description instructions and the verifier.py VLM prompt.
